questions.q: Which country's institute named "Institute for Economics and Peace" released Global Terrorism Index 2026?

questions.q: Whose signature will appear on US dollar bills from June 2026?
questions.urdu: جون 2026 سے امریکی ڈالر کے بلوں پر کس کے دستخط نظر آئیں گے؟
questions.explanation: Starting in June 2026, new U.S. dollar bills will feature the signatures of President Donald J. Trump and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

questions.q: Who became the Prime Minister of Nepal after the 2026 general elections?
questions.urdu: دو ہزار چھبیس کے عام انتخابات کے بعد نیپال کا وزیر اعظم کون بنا؟
questions.explanation: Nepal held general elections in 2026 to choose members of its Parliament.

questions.q: Which Pakistani official traveled to Tehran in May 2026 for mediation efforts between US and Iran?
questions.urdu: کس پاکستانی عہدیدار نے مئی 2026 میں امریکہ اور ایران کے درمیان ثالثی کی کوششوں کے لیے تہران کا سفر کیا؟
questions.explanation: Pakistan's Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi visited Tehran from May 16-18, 2026 to meet with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian and prevent ongoing ceasefire negotiations from collapsing.

questions.q: Who is the current President of Bolivia?
questions.urdu: بولیویا کا موجودہ صدر کون ہے؟
questions.explanation: Rodrigo Paz is the current & 68th president of Bolivia.

questions.q: Who is the current prime minister of Azerbaijan?
questions.urdu: آذربائیجان کا موجودہ وزیر اعظم کون ہے؟
questions.explanation: As of May 2026, Ali Asadov is the current and 10th Prime Minister of Azerbaijan.

questions.q: In which province of China did the major coal mine accident occur in May 2026?
questions.urdu: مئی 2026 میں چین کے کس صوبے میں کوئلے کی کان میں بڑا حادثہ پیش آیا؟
questions.explanation: On 22 May 2026, a deadly coal mine explosion that killed dozens of people occurred in Shanxi province.

questions.q: In which country did the World Health Organization (WHO) declare the Ebola outbreak a 'Global Health Emergency' in May 2026?
questions.urdu: ورلڈ ہیلتھ آرگنائزیشن (وبلیو ایچ او) نے مئی 2026 میں ایبولا کی وبا کو 'عالمی صحت کی ایمرجنسی' کس ملک میں قرار دیا؟
questions.explanation: The World Health Organization (WHO) declared the May 2026 Ebola outbreak a 'Public Health Emergency of International Concern' based on an epidemic centered in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), which subsequently spread across the border into Uganda.

questions.q: For which novel did author Yáng Shuāng-zǐ receive the 2026 International Booker Prize?
questions.urdu: مصنف یانگ شوانگزاؤ کو کس ناول کے لیے 2026 کا بین الاقوامی بکر پرائز ملا؟
questions.explanation: About 2026 International Booker Prize

questions.q: Pakistan Air Force (PAF) defeated which of the following to win the 2026 National Senior Men’s Volleyball Championship?
questions.urdu: پاکستان ایئر فورس (پی اے ایف) نے 2026 نیشنل سینئر مینز والی بال چیمپئن شپ جیتنے کے لیے درج ذیل میں سے کس کو شکست دی؟
questions.explanation: About 2026 National Senior Men’s Volleyball Championship

questions.q: When is  World Football Day celebrated every year?
questions.urdu: فٹ بال کا عالمی دن ہر سال کب منایا جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: 25 May has been proclaimed by the United Nations as World Football Day.

questions.q: When is Africa day observed?
questions.urdu: افریقہ ڈے کب منایا جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: Africa Day is observed every year on May 25.

questions.q: Who among the following won the 2026 National Senior Men’s Volleyball Championship?

questions.explanation: About National Senior Men’s Volleyball Championship
